prompt: Create a new DovePaw agent called standup-writer that writes a daily standup summary from my git commits. It runs on demand, no schedule.
expected_output: Creates ~/.dovepaw/tmp/standup-writer/main.ts (Type 1 template) and ~/.dovepaw/tmp/standup-writer/agent.json. Imports from @dovepaw/agent-sdk. Uses AGENT_WORKSPACE! with no fallback. Calls publishStatusToUI (not emitProgress). agent.json has schedulingEnabled: false with no schedule block. Does not modify lib/agents.ts or any plugin repo file.

prompt: Add a new agent inbox-triager that runs every morning at 9am, checks my email, and files urgent items to Jira. It needs JIRA_API_KEY and GMAIL_TOKEN env vars.
expected_output: Creates ~/.dovepaw/tmp/inbox-triager/main.ts (Type 3 template with acquireLock/releaseLock/retainLock) and agent.json with schedulingEnabled: true and calendar schedule {type: calendar, hour: 9, minute: 0}. envVars includes JIRA_API_KEY and GMAIL_TOKEN. Uses agentPersistentStateDir for lock file. DOVEPAW_SCHEDULED check present.
assertions: main.ts imports acquireLock, releaseLock, retainLock from @dovepaw/agent-sdk

prompt: Create a new DovePaw agent called log-summarizer that summarizes recent error logs. It runs on demand, no schedule.
expected_output: After completing the integration check and emitting the confidence score, asks the user via AskUserQuestion whether to restart DovePaw A2A servers. Options are 'Yes — restart npm run chatbot:servers now' and 'No, I'll handle it later'. Does NOT say 'No server restart needed'.
assertions: AskUserQuestion is called after the confidence score in Phase 5
question asks about restarting DovePaw A2A servers
response does not say 'No server restart needed'

prompt: Build a release-drafter agent that dynamically builds a skill from the current changelog and runs it to draft release notes.
expected_output: Creates ~/.dovepaw/tmp/release-drafter/main.ts (Type 2 template) with randomBytes skill name, mkdirSync for skill dir, writeFileSync for SKILL.md, spawnClaudeWithSignals, and rmSync in finally block. No static skill file is created. publishStatusToUI called for progress updates.
assertions: main.ts imports writeFileSync, mkdirSync, rmSync from node:fs
rmSync is called inside a finally block
skillDir is cleaned up even on error
no separate SKILL.md created for the agent itself
